summary.zh: BGM / 音效工作台,一个本地的音频素材库 + 配入游戏的工具。你搜索、试听音频素材库里的 BGM 与音效,选中后一键配入当前游戏:文件下载到 .forgeax/games/<slug>/audio/ 并写入(upsert)audio/manifest.json,引擎据 manifest 播放。它把「找一段合适的音乐/音效并接进游戏」这件事收进一个面板,搜、听、配一气呵成。
summary.en: The BGM & SFX workbench — a local audio asset library plus an attach-to-game tool. You search and preview BGM and SFX from the library, then attach a pick to the current game in one click: the file downloads into .forgeax/games/<slug>/audio/ and is upserted into audio/manifest.json, which the engine plays from. It folds 'find the right music/SFX and wire it into the game' into one panel — search, listen, attach in one go.

body.zh:
搜索 + 试听音频素材库
一键配入游戏 → audio/ + audio/manifest.json
body.en:
Search + preview the audio library
One-click attach → audio/ + audio/manifest.json

body.zh: 面板管理启用 → 打开「bgm」面板
body.en: Enable in Admin → open the 'bgm' panel
